summary: Frontend testing completed for QuickVid AI / InfluencerSeninle. All requested features verified: Login/logout flow, dashboard stability (no auto-logout after 2 minutes), pricing format ($X.XX /ay without icons) on both landing page and subscription/plans page, navigation between dashboard sections, video list display, credit display in header, and Instagram link in footer.

issues: Credit display shows '0' in header - missing data-testid attribute for easier testing

critical_code_review_comments: Pricing format correctly shows USD ($9.90, $19.90, $39.90) with /ay suffix on both landing page and subscription panel
No TL currency symbols found - USD format is correct
Dashboard stability verified - no auto-logout after 2 minutes of idle time
Login/logout flow works correctly with admin credentials
All navigation items (Ana Sayfa, Videolarım, Video Üret, Planlar, Ayarlar) are accessible
Video list displays correctly with 3 demo videos
Instagram link in footer points to correct URL (https://instagram.com/influencerseninle)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working correctly. Dashboard stability verified - no auto-logout bug. Pricing shows correct USD format ($X.XX /ay) without icons. Login flow works with provided admin credentials. User has 3 demo videos and 0 credits.
